title: Implement client.quadlets.install
body:
Install quadlet passing them to the install function as as a tuples (name, content) or a file path or a list of both.

Fixes: https://issues.redhat.com/browse/RUN-4367

comments.body: @Honny1 to solve all the validation issues I created a `_validate_files_type` function that will fail early on type, provide nice error messages on TypeError/ValueError. Then I unit tested that function and provided examples in the doc. Much of the code didn't change, I simply moved it to this new function. Again I did a separate commit for your convenience but I plan to squash it before merge
